reviews.review_title: Honest review on the game in full detail
reviews.review_description: This game is probably the best modded gorilla tag based game out their because this game has very welcoming staff/players a very chill community yes u may see some rule breakers in lobbies and some ppl saying bad words just try egnore then report them get evidencial proof of the negitive things their doing and send it to the discord the good thing about this game is that if you report someone to the discord and ingame and you have evidencial proof of what they have done is wrong they dont just see and it go oh well not my problem they deal with it very well when i was a member i reported 19people to the discord in 1 day and all of them got banned bec i had undenyable proof of what they had done and if you feel like you have been falsly banned come to the discord explain your point of view and if it goes through and you get unbanned great jf it is a miss ban so an accident the staff member will just be spoken to but if they had purposfully false banned you they could face warnings or even demotion and instead of begging for staff Join the discord MOD APPS AT 2,250 MEMBERS so with that info u can stop begging for staff and join the discord the staff req are you must be 13+ you must be active have readable spelling and please dont just write because i do or just ban them write a full explanation on the topic dont just when it gets to the "what would you do if someones cheating" dont just say ban them u give 3 warnings for cheating 3 warnings for toxicaty and 0 warnings for hate speech it will not be tolerated in this community if you want to use bannable modds by all means you can use them ONLY IN CITY CASUALS OR CODES THATS IT NOT INFECTION OK good now besides that this gane has brilliant mod menus acctually some really good players clans via TBJ and loads others it also comes with trusted user stick which u unlock after playing for 3000 seconds TRUSTED USER STICK DOESNT MEAN YOUR STAFF OR HAVE ANY OTHER ACCEPTION TO ANYONE ELS  just bec u have the trusted stick doesnt mean you can fly tag or be toxic or false report people its just another cosmetic now the explanations for cosmetics :forest guide stick dark blue stick NOT TRUSTED STICK: Moderator stick: Developer stick in gorilla tag: administraitor:admin badge co-owner: Co-Owner title above their head and a giant stick Owner title: Owner title Zox title: Zox title L2cky title: l2cky title thank you for reading this have a nice day :)

reviews.review_title: This game isn’t fun because the staff ba
reviews.review_description: This game isn’t fun because the staff banned me for basically nothing. When I checked Discord to see if my actions were bannable, I found that not a single word stated they were. Also, there are too many cheaters, and overall, it is not a good game."
